title: Section 10
content: (1) The Commission shall meet at such time and place as the Chairperson may think fit. 1 [(2) Subject to the provisions of this Act and the rules made thereunder, the Commission shall have the power to lay down by regulations its own procedure.] (3) All orders and decisions of the Commission shall be authenticated by the Secretary-General or any other officer of the Commission duly authorised by the Chairperson in this behalf.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 23-11-2006).
